sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Judge Dredd (SNES)
notes: T3 empirical/qualitative data tier. Sources document developer credits listing sprite graphics artists (Eric Bailey, Pierson Lippard, Darren Goodacre, Lloyd Chidgzey) and background graphics artists (Anthony 'Blizzard' Rosbottom, Phil Williams, Steve Middleton), but contain no specific sprite dimensions, color palette counts, tile specifications, or animation frame data. Wikipedia disambiguation page provides only release date and platform information with no visual design parameters.
